name: 5dim_nuclear
title: 5Dim's mod - Nuclear
author: 5Dim
description:
Nuclear module for 5Dim's mod
Expands nuclear power generation with tiered components
This mod includes:
- 10 tiers of nuclear reactors
- 10 tiers of heat exchangers
- 10 tiers of heat pipes
- 10 tiers of steam turbines
- 10 tiers of centrifuges
